title: Sagraea heteroneura
taxonomy: Sagraea heteroneura is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales and the clade Asterids. The genus Sagraea is a part of the tribe Gentianeae. Sagraea heteroneura is native to South America. The classification of Sagraea heteroneura helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological characteristics.
